_about.title: A1 — Runtime foundation (@agent-ui/a2ui): zero-dep renderer + default catalog
_about.method: system-decompose, both planes. OUTSIDE-IN = the renderer+catalog subsystems mapped onto the LLDs' existing module sets (no invented structure). INSIDE-OUT = the A1 capabilities anchored to runtime + catalog SPEC requirements. The `build`/`dep` keys on each leaf overlay the current G1 ground state onto the coverage-clean structure (the gate ignores them).
_about.ground_state: As of the latest commit: packages/agent-ui/a2ui EXISTS, and A1's validation spine is SHIPPED + committed (gate-green) — cat-c1 catalog model, cat-c2 naming, cat-c6 conformance, r-c11 validate.ts (with the missing-root rule), plus r-c3 surface.ts (LLD-C3, N3 leak-free). The control-dependent tail is still blocked: @agent-ui/components remains at G1 (reactive/ kernel only — signal/computed/effect/createScope/inspect/whenFlushed; dom/ traits/ controls/ are empty stubs — no `repeat` directive, no ui-* controls).
_about.resolved: The two cross-LLD parity tensions are resolved + committed (ADR-0002): missing-root is rejected by the shared id-graph at finalize granularity (renderer LLD-C11/C13); the shared validator's JSON-pointer check is syntactic-only (RFC-6901), with pointer-resolution reframed as a corpus-admission-only stage (corpus LLD-C5). validateA2ui stays byte-identical for both callers (SPEC-N6/N1).

_build_legend.shipped: SHIPPED + committed (post-G1): module exists and is gate-green (npm run check && npm test); see git history + ADR-0002 for the validator parity delta
_build_legend.now: buildable at current G1 — no ui-* control, no `repeat` directive, no @agent-ui/shared token dependency
_build_legend.partial: core logic buildable now against a stub element/catalog; full SPEC acceptance (real-control render proof) blocked on the control family
_build_legend.blocked:controls: needs the ui-* control family (Assumption A-2 / component plan ~G7)
_build_legend.blocked:repeat: needs the kernel `repeat` directive from @agent-ui/components dom/ (an empty stub today)
_build_legend.blocked:tokens: applier mechanism buildable now; the token roles it repoints need @agent-ui/shared (G5)

nodes.label: surface.ts — surface model (signals state)
nodes.dep: SHIPPED + committed: scope+AbortController lifetime, N3 leak-free (inspect()==0). Built on the kernel (createScope/signal/inspect).

nodes.label: tree.ts — buffer + tree reconstructor
nodes.dep: tree/idgraph/pendingParents logic now against stub widgets; real render proof blocked:controls

nodes.label: widget.ts — widget factory / catalog resolver
nodes.dep: resolution + unknown-type placeholder now against a stub factory; real widget instantiation blocked:controls

nodes.label: input.ts — two-way input binding controller
nodes.dep: generic value:{prop,event} wiring now against a stub; real two-way proof blocked:controls

nodes.label: functions.ts — client-side function evaluator
nodes.dep: pure evaluator; reads fn defs from catalog cat-c7 (in-package)

nodes.label: validate.ts — shared validator (gates all)
nodes.dep: SHIPPED + committed with the missing-root rule (ADR-0002): id-graph = exactly-one-root/acyclic/no-dangling at finalize, pointer syntactic-only. Carries only the `Catalog` type from cat-c1 (compile-time). Imported by corpus admission (N6 parity).

nodes.label: capabilities.ts — client capabilities
nodes.dep: reads supportedCatalogIds() from registry cat-c3 (buildable now)

nodes.label: renderer.ts — host / orchestrator
nodes.dep: mount/ingest/onClientMessage/dispose wiring now; the A1 integration proof (stream → real ui-* controls) blocked:controls

nodes.label: catalog.ts — Catalog schema model + loader
nodes.dep: SHIPPED + committed: pure JSON parse + structural validate; PRODUCES the `Catalog` type r-c11 depends on

nodes.label: naming.ts — UAX-31 / @ naming validator
nodes.dep: SHIPPED + committed: precompiled Unicode-property regex; pure

nodes.label: registry.ts — CatalogRegistry (two-tier)
nodes.dep: register/get/supportedCatalogIds; checkpoint uses SYNTHETIC factories — no real controls needed

nodes.label: default/catalog.json — default catalog defn
nodes.dep: a minimal Text→primitive catalog now (SPEC-N2 coverage discipline); the useful Button/TextField/Checkbox/Switch/Select/Field set blocked:controls

nodes.label: conformance.ts — catalog-conformance validator
nodes.dep: SHIPPED + committed: pure (Catalog + component → Failure[]); composed into r-c11 validate.ts. Pointer-resolution is a corpus-only stage, not here (ADR-0002).

nodes.label: theme.ts — surfaceProperties / token applier
nodes.dep: CSS-var repoint mechanism now; token roles need @agent-ui/shared (G5)

actions.label: ingest JSONL lines + dispatch by type in arrival order
route by message version; reject unsupported
isolate faults — one bad line / unknown type does not tear down the stream
create/delete surface; bind catalog; register surfaceProperties + sendDataModel
leak-free teardown — scope.dispose + ac.abort, inspect()==0
buffer flat components by id; reconstruct tree; render-on-root; exactly one root
progressive first paint on root arrival (no wait for stream end)
hold unresolved child/path references; patch in on later arrival
resolve JSON-Pointer bindings; re-resolve the widget when bound data changes
a one-path update wakes only its dependents (Object.is cutoff)
iterate a children-bound array with a per-item child scope; delta-only add/remove
two-way optimistic input binding (display + write-back on user input)
emit action (actionId / wantResponse / sendDataModel) + correlate actionResponse
resolve component type against bound catalog → widget; unknown-type placeholder
evaluate catalog client functions referenced in bindings/checks
validate payloads (shape→schema→catalog→id-graph→pointer) → structured error
validator parity — one implementation, shared with corpus admission
declare a2uiClientCapabilities (protocol versions, supported catalogs)
wire mount/ingest/onClientMessage/dispose; the error table is the test matrix
build on the kernel + ui-* only — no third-party runtime dependency
load + structural-validate a versioned JSON-Schema catalog
enforce UAX-31 names; reject the reserved @ namespace
enforce the component-definition contract (typed props, value/event, child model)
register/get/supportedCatalogIds; factory-missing throws; zero-edit two-tier
default catalog reflects ui-* directly; coverage tracks the control family
widget factories bind each component type to a ui-* control
payload conformance — unknown type/prop or type-mismatch → CATALOG
security allowlist — only cataloged components render; no unsafe sinks
client function library — required/email/regex (named args)
surfaceProperties → token-role repoint (pure CSS-var indirection)

renderer_lld_§11: 1. r-c11 validate.ts — SHIPPED + committed (missing-root rule, ADR-0002; closed corpus LLD step-3 TODO)
2. r-c3 surface.ts — SHIPPED + committed (scope/AbortController, N3 leak-free)
3. r-c1/r-c2 parser + dispatch — NOW (JSONL, version routing, fault isolation)
5. r-c7 widget.ts — PARTIAL (stub catalog now; real widgets blocked:controls)
6. r-c4 tree.ts — PARTIAL (logic now; real render proof blocked:controls)
7. r-c8 input + r-c9 action — r-c9 NOW; r-c8 PARTIAL (blocked:controls for proof)
11. r-c13 renderer.ts host — PARTIAL (integration proof blocked:controls)
catalog_lld_§10: 2. cat-c1 catalog.ts model+loader — SHIPPED + committed (produces the Catalog type)
4. cat-c6 conformance.ts — SHIPPED + committed (catalog half of validate.ts; parity)
5. cat-c5 factories + cat-c4 default catalog — BLOCKED:controls (Text-only minimal is NOW)
7. cat-c8 theme.ts — BLOCKED:tokens (mechanism now; roles need @agent-ui/shared G5)
8. integration (conformance→validate.ts, factories→widget resolution) — BLOCKED:controls for full proof

_smallest_viable_slice.name: validation spine — control-free, repeat-free, token-free
_smallest_viable_slice.status: SHIPPED + committed (gate-green) — cat-c2, cat-c1, cat-c6, r-c11; r-c3 surface.ts (LLD-C3) landed alongside. Was the ADR-0001 entry point to A1.
_smallest_viable_slice.order: cat-c2 naming → cat-c1 catalog model (+ Catalog type) → cat-c6 conformance → r-c11 validate.ts
_smallest_viable_slice.delivers: renderer SPEC-R11 + SPEC-N6 (validator parity); catalog SPEC-R1, R2, R7. Closed the corpus LLD step-3 import TODO.
_smallest_viable_slice.validate_smallest_dep: validate.ts (r-c11) carries only the `Catalog` TYPE from catalog cat-c1 — compile-time, in-slice. No kernel, no ui-* controls, no `repeat` directive.
_smallest_viable_slice.why: Renderer LLD §11 step 1 already names validate.ts 'first: it gates everything and is shared.' This slice started A1 without outrunning the controls (Assumption A-2).
